channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: Pronóstico Semanal de Forex – USD/JPY, Petróleo Crudo Brent, Gasolina, Índice S&P 500 - 22 marzo 2026
item.description: La escalada de la guerra en Oriente Medio está impulsando los precios de la energía al alza y las acciones a la baja, mientras que los bancos centrales, en general agresivos, están elevando los rendimientos. Fuente: DailyForex ES

item.title: Bitcoin Price Prediction March 2026: Macro Forces Redirect Capital as the PEPE Cofounder's Presale Draws Analyst Attention Away From Established Altcoins
item.description: The bitcoin price prediction for March 2026 begins with macro forces that often move crypto more than individual project upgrades. According to CoinDesk, global dollar flows are shifting as USD/JPY moves and central bank policy divergence weaken the dollar and Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: US Ship Carrying LPG Reaches India Amid West Asia Crisis
item.description: (MENAFN - IANS) New Delhi, March 22 (IANS) Amid the global supply chain crisis, a large cargo ship carrying liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) from the US has arrived at the Mangalore Port in the ... Fuente: NewsData USD

item.title: Weekly Review Of Azerbaijan's Currency Market
item.description: (MENAFN - Trend News Agency) BAKU, Azerbaijan, March 22. The official exchange rate of the Azerbaijani manat against the U.S. dollar, as set by the Central Bank of Azerbaijan (CBA), remained ... Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: ‘Trumpflation’: how the Iran war’s economic storm could affect Britons
item.description: Yet another cost of living crisis looms with fuel, food, holiday, energy and home loan prices expected to rise Fuente: NewsData GBP

item.title: How the Australian bond market became a hedge fund haven
item.description: Australia has the highest bond rates in the developed world and a central bank battling to slay inflation. It’s a great set up for traders. Fuente: NewsData AUD

item.title: Japan, South Korea petrochemical industry slows output on Iran war
item.description: AgenciesThe Middle East war is forcing petrochemical giants in two key Asian economies to cut production as the conflict rattles supplies of a crucial oil-derived component used to... Fuente: NewsData JPY

item.title: Cost of living is about to surge because of Trump’s war on Iran & he wants US to clean up his bloody mess?
item.description: IT feels like only yesterday that President Trump was purring with pleasure in Windsor Castle – cutting the UK special trade deals, calling our PM a “great gentleman” and cheerfully cutting the ribbon on his new golf course in Aberdeenshire. Yet suddenly the special relationship is an abusive relationship. President Trump sneers that Keir Starmer..... Fuente: NewsData GBP

item.title: Mortgage Digest: Bond yield spike drives latest fixed mortgage rate hikes of up to 30 bps – CMT News
item.description: Canadian fixed mortgage rates have moved decisively higher, with lenders rolling out increases of up to 30 basis points as bond yields continue their rapid climb. The benchmark five-year Government of Canada bond yield—used to price most fixed mortgages—has surged more than 60 basis points since last month, including a 22-basis-point jump on Friday... Fuente: NewsData GBP

item.title: Shockwave of War Is Rippling Through the Global Economy
item.description: The global economy’s first collective health check since war broke out in the Middle East will arrive in the form of business surveys from the US to the euro zone. Fuente: NewsData AUD

item.title: Best VPN deals: Get up to 88% off and unlock 4 months of VPN for FREE with latest 2026 discounts
item.description: Hunting for the best VPN deals in the UK ? You're in luck; some of the biggest VPN providers have slashed prices – ideal if you want to secure a discount on your subscription for the rest of 2026 (and beyond). Award-winning brands like ExpressVPN , NordVPN , Proton , CyberGhost , and Surfshark have cut subscription costs. These brands offer several... Fuente: NewsData CHF

item.title: Dollar Slides as ECB Out-Hawks Fed Amid Oil Shock and Rising Inflation Risks
item.description: Dollar had every reason to rally last week, but instead ended as the worst performer among major currencies. Sharp selloff in global equities, surging Treasury yields, and escalating geopolitical risks would typically trigger strong safe-haven demand for the greenback. Yet, that relationship broke down. The key driver behind this anomaly is the gro... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: investingLive Americas market news wrap: Nowhere to hide
item.description: Trump says reopening Hormuz "a simple military manoeuver" with "so little risk" US made detailed preparations for potential ground troops in Iran - report US assessment: Iran could keep Hormuz shut for anywhere from one to six months Iran unwilling to discuss Hormuz while under attack - report Canada January retail sales +1.1% vs +1.5% expected Can... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Forecasting the upcoming week: Hawkish Fed meets escalating Iran war
item.description: The US Dollar (USD)i weakened this week, with the US Dollar Index (DXY) slipping back below 100.00 to 99.60 on Friday after a surge in the middle of the week driven by the Federal Reserve's (Fed) decision to hold rates in the 3.50%-3.75% range. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Trump on opening the Strait of Hormuz: You need a lot of help
item.description: At a certain point, the Strait will open itself I think Israel will be ready to end the war when the US wants it to end I don't want to do a ceasefire We can have dialogue but I don't want to do a ceasefire On Hormuz: It would be nice if China and Japan got involved On UK help: A very late response, they should have acted faster Says lacks radar, a... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: The Fed funds futures market is now pricing in a 30% chance of a US rate hike
item.description: The market is sensing that energy prices will stay higher for longer as the US and Israel struggle to define a plan for peace and reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Trump today in a Truth Social post said it would be easy to re-open the strait and that the US was prepared to do it alone. The market doesn't believe it as Brent crude oil is now up $4 to... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: NASDAQ index down -2% and S&P index down -1.5%
item.description: As we head into the close, the major US stock indices are pressing to new lows for the day and the week, with downside momentum building. The S P 500 is down nearly 1.5%, while the NASDAQ has extended losses to around -2.0%, reflecting broad-based selling pressure. This week marks an important technical shift, as both indices have now moved below t... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: US assessment: Iran could keep Hormuz shut for anywhere from one to six months
item.description: CNN is out with a report highlighting the difficulty of reopening the Strait of Hormuz: US officials are furiously trying to avert a potential months-long closure of the Strait of Hormuz, privately acknowledging that reopening the key waterway is a problem without a clear solution The report from the Defense Intelligence Agency said it could remain... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Asset Purchase Facility: Gilt Sales – Market Notice 20 March 2026
item.description: This Market Notice sets out the schedule for sales in Q2 2026 of gilts held in the Asset Purchase Facility (APF) for monetary policy purposes. Fuente: Bank of England

item.title: Pound Sterling Price News and Forecast: GBP/USD trips down below 1.3350 as oil surges
item.description: The GBP/USD trims some of its Thursday’s gains, down by 0.84%, as traders turned risk-averse amid an escalation of the Middle East conflict and priced in no rate cuts by the Federal Reserve in 2026. At the time of writing, the pair trades below 1.3350 after hitting a daily high of 1.3442. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD strength vs Euro vulnerability: What’s next for the EUR/USD pair?
item.description: EUR/USD tests key level (1.1578) as the ECB's hawkish stance battles downside risks from Middle East conflict and spiking energy costs. The article analyzes the "April Hike" wildcard, NFP volatility, and critical technical levels. Outlook is split between technical recovery and fundamental risks. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: GBP/USD trips down below 1.3350 as Oil surges, Fed outlook boosts US Dollar
item.description: GBP/USD trims some of its previous-day gains on Friday, down by 0.84%, as traders turn risk-averse amid an escalation of the Middle East war and price in no rate cuts by the Federal Reserve (Fed) in 2026. At the time of writing, the pair trades below 1.3350 after hitting a daily high of 1.3442. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: AUD/USD falls as geopolitical tensions overshadow RBA rate hike
item.description: AUD/USD trades lower around 0.7040 on Friday at the time of writing, down 0.68% on the day, as the pair is pressured by a return of safe-haven demand despite supportive domestic factors in Australia. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EUR/USD Weekly Forecast: War continues to steal the limelight, and not for good
item.description: The EUR/USD pair bounced back in the last few days, settling for the week around 1.1530. The Iran war and central banks’ monetary policy announcements took centre stage, yet none was enough to impress speculative interest. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: GBP/USD Appreciates BoE Pause: Now Focus Shifts to Geopolitics
item.description: By Analytical Department RoboForex GBP/USD rose during the previous session and is now correcting to 1.3403. The pound responded positively to the Bank of England’s decision to keep interest rates unchanged, with market attention focused on the regulator’s guidance on how the Iran conflict might influence future policy. The Monetary Policy Committe... Fuente: InvestMacro

item.title: EUR/GBP rises as markets assess ECB and BoE rate decisions, inflation outlook
item.description: EUR/GBP edges higher on Friday, recovering losses recorded in the previous day after the European Central Bank (ECB) and Bank of England (BoE) monetary policy announcements. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD/JPY rebounds as US Dollar strengthens, BoJ hawkishness tempers upside potential
item.description: USD/JPY trades around 158.70 on Friday at the time of writing, up 0.61% on the day, staging a clear rebound after Thursday’s sharp decline. The move comes as the US Dollar (USD) regains traction following a bout of volatility, with markets reassessing the outlook for US monetary policy. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Euro Gains on ECB Hike Bets but Lacks Breakout Without Policy Action
item.description: ECB rate hike expectations are gaining traction in markets, with growing speculation that tightening could begin as early as April. Major institutions including Barclays and J.P. Morgan are now forecasting an initial move next month, followed by additional hikes in June and July, reflecting a rapid shift in policy expectations amid rising inflation... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: GBP/USD retreats as BoE hawkish shift meets resilient US Dollar
item.description: GBP/USD retreats on Friday, trading around 1.3380 at the time of writing, down 0.39% on the day, after Thursday’s strong rally following the Bank of England (BoE) decision. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB's Makhlouf: Don't think ECB has a tightening bias
item.description: European Central Bank (ECB) policymaker and Governor of the Central Bank of Ireland Gabriel Makhlouf stated during European trading hours on Friday that the central bank doesn’t have a pre-determined rate path and the decision would be made meeting by meeting. Fuente: FXStreet
